introSection: Rasender Tausendfüßler (English: Raging Millipede) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Erlebnispark Tripsdrill in Cleebronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a Millipede.

fullText:
Rasender Tausendfüßler (English: Raging Millipede) is a steel roller coaster currently located at Erlebnispark Tripsdrill in Cleebronn, Baden-Württemberg, Germany.



Green track and supports.

The train is designed to resemble a Millipede.
